title: Plusiers Fishes au Chocolat
description: Mod adding plenty fishes au chocolat
body:
Plusiers Fishes au Chocolat (PFAC for short) adds the fabled Fishes au Chocolat and a number of cursed features related to them.

## You should totally try:
* Hitting your friends with a fishe
* Putting a fishe in a jukebox
* Drinking whatever slop is brewed from a pufferfish when chocolate is involved (ew?)
* Shooting a fishe out of a potato cannon (see Create)

## Why would you do this?
This is a joke mod I started as an exercise in learning modding concepts. Besides, my friends have a terrible sense of humor.
